description:
Offered: Spring
This course is a continuation of BIOL 2004 (Human Anatomy and Physiology I) . The following systems are covered: circulatory, respiratory, digestive, lymphatic, digestive excretory, and reproductive. The laboratory complements lecture topics. Prerequisite(s): BIOL 1800 , BIOL 1900 , BIOL 2004 , and CHEM 1300 Note: Credit is granted only for Biology 2004/2005 or Biology 1200/1300 or BIOL 2420.
